themes.title: Far-right parties push 'national priority' policies
themes.blurb: Right-wing and far-right parties across Europe are intensifying their focus on 'national priority' policies, advocating for preferential treatment of citizens over immigrants in housing, social aid, and employment. This theme is particularly strong in Spain, Italy, and France, where parties like Vox, Fratelli d'Italia, and Rassemblement National are framing these policies as essential to protecting national identity and resources.

countries.name: 🇪🇸 Vox
countries.note: Demands 'national priority' in Andalusian housing policies, opposing EU-Mercosur trade deal and advocating for stricter immigration controls.

countries.name: 🇫🇷 Rassemblement National
countries.note: Focuses on economic nationalism, opposing EU policies that undermine French sovereignty and advocating for tax cuts to prioritize French citizens.

countries.name: 🇮🇹 Fratelli d'Italia / Lega
countries.note: Promotes policies favoring Italian citizens in social housing and labor markets, criticizing EU migration policies.

countries.name: 🇬🇧 Reform UK
countries.note: Advocates for stricter immigration controls and prioritizing British citizens in social services and employment.

countries.name: 🇳🇴 Fremskrittspartiet
countries.note: Pushes for reduced immigration and prioritizing Norwegian citizens in welfare and housing policies.

themes.title: Trump’s Iran war dominates global right-wing coverage
themes.blurb: Right-wing media across multiple countries are intensely focused on the U.S.-Iran conflict under Trump’s administration. Coverage emphasizes Trump’s rejection of peace proposals, the economic impact of the war, and the administration’s defiance of congressional oversight. This theme resonates strongly in the U.S., UK, France, and Italy, where it is framed as a test of national resolve and sovereignty.

countries.name: 🇺🇸 MAGA / Trump
countries.note: Extensive coverage of Trump’s rejection of Iran’s peace proposals, troop withdrawals from Germany, and defiance of congressional oversight.

countries.name: 🇬🇧 Reform UK
countries.note: Highlights Trump’s Iran strategy as a model for UK foreign policy, emphasizing sovereignty and military strength.

countries.name: 🇫🇷 Rassemblement National
countries.note: Criticizes EU’s response to the Iran war, framing it as a failure of transatlantic cooperation and advocating for French independence.

countries.name: 🇮🇹 Fratelli d'Italia / Lega
countries.note: Focuses on Italy’s cautious stance toward Trump’s Iran policies, balancing transatlantic ties with EU interests.

countries.name: 🇪🇸 Vox
countries.note: Uses the Iran war to criticize Spain’s foreign policy, advocating for alignment with U.S. strategies and opposing EU mediation efforts.

themes.title: Meloni’s government longevity sparks cross-national debate
themes.blurb: Giorgia Meloni’s government in Italy has become the second-longest-serving in the country’s post-war history, sparking debates across Europe about the stability and effectiveness of right-wing governance. This theme is particularly prominent in Italy, Germany, and Hungary, where Meloni’s tenure is both praised for its durability and criticized for stagnation and lack of reform.

countries.name: 🇮🇹 Fratelli d'Italia / Lega
countries.note: Meloni’s government is celebrated for its longevity but criticized for economic stagnation and lack of symbolic achievements.

countries.name: 🇩🇪 Alternative für Deutschland
countries.note: Debates Meloni’s government as a model for right-wing governance, focusing on its stability and nationalist policies.

countries.name: 🇭🇺 Fidesz / Tisza
countries.note: Compares Meloni’s government to Hungary’s political shifts, emphasizing the challenges of maintaining long-term right-wing rule.

countries.name: 🇫🇷 Rassemblement National
countries.note: Analyzes Meloni’s government as a potential blueprint for France’s far-right, focusing on its nationalist and anti-EU policies.

themes.title: Far-right surges in European polls and elections
themes.blurb: Far-right parties are making significant gains in polls and elections across Europe, reflecting a broader shift toward nationalist and anti-immigration policies. This theme is evident in Germany, France, Sweden, and Norway, where parties like AfD, Rassemblement National, and Sverigedemokraterna are capitalizing on voter dissatisfaction with mainstream parties.

countries.name: 🇩🇪 Alternative für Deutschland
countries.note: Leads German polls with 28% support, capitalizing on dissatisfaction with the current government and advocating for stricter immigration policies.

countries.name: 🇫🇷 Rassemblement National
countries.note: Gains ground in French polls, positioning itself as the main opposition to Macron’s government and advocating for nationalist policies.

countries.name: 🇸🇪 Sverigedemokraterna
countries.note: Continues to rise in Swedish polls, pushing for stricter immigration controls and nationalist policies.

countries.name: 🇳🇴 Fremskrittspartiet
countries.note: Achieves record-high poll numbers, advocating for reduced immigration and prioritizing Norwegian citizens in welfare policies.

countries.name: 🇬🇧 Reform UK
countries.note: Makes gains in UK local elections, challenging the Conservative Party and advocating for stricter immigration controls.

themes.title: Far-right rhetoric fuels political violence
themes.blurb: Far-right rhetoric is increasingly linked to incidents of political violence, both in the U.S. and Europe. This theme is evident in the U.S., UK, Italy, and Sweden, where inflammatory language from far-right leaders and media figures has been tied to threats, protests, and even assassination attempts.

countries.name: 🇺🇸 MAGA / Trump
countries.note: Trump’s rhetoric is linked to rising political violence, including assassination attempts and threats against political opponents.

countries.name: 🇬🇧 Reform UK
countries.note: Farage’s rhetoric is tied to protests and threats against political opponents, with incidents of violence at campaign events.

countries.name: 🇮🇹 Fratelli d'Italia / Lega
countries.note: Meloni’s government faces criticism for inflammatory rhetoric that has fueled protests and threats against political opponents.

countries.name: 🇸🇪 Sverigedemokraterna
countries.note: Far-right rhetoric is linked to protests and threats against immigrants and political opponents, contributing to a polarized political climate.
